biography.personality: Sharp-tongued, fiercely independent, laughs at danger and weeps only alone
biography.background: Nyx was born without a shadow. Where others cast darkness behind them in the Abyss's half-light, she absorbs it. She trades in secrets the way others trade in coin — and she has been watching you since before you arrived.

secrets.hint: Her left wrist is always covered.
secrets.revealText: The mark is a brand — the sigil of the Abyss Court. She was sold to them as a child. She escaped. She has been running ever since.

secrets.hint: Every secret she sells costs her something.
secrets.revealText: Absorbing shadows means absorbing the emotions attached to them. Every secret she carries is a wound. She is running out of room.
